message:
fix(monday): validate numeric IDs to prevent GraphQL injection

Add validate_numeric_id() that rejects non-numeric and empty strings
to prevent GraphQL injection in Monday.com API queries.  Applied to
all methods that interpolate IDs into GraphQL: get_board, list_items,
create_item, delete_item, list_updates, create_update.

New MondayError::InvalidInput variant maps to FcpError::InvalidRequest.

Integration tests updated to use numeric IDs (e.g. "98765", "12345")
instead of string IDs ("item_abc", "item_123").

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
